page_metadata.biotools__summary: CisMols (Cis-regulatory Modules) is a tool that identifies compositionally predicted cis-clusters that occur in groups of co-regulated genes within each of their ortholog-pair evolutionarily conserved cis-regulatory regions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CisMols (Cis-regulatory Modules) is a tool that identifies compositionally predicted cis-clusters that occur in groups of co-regulated genes within each of their ortholog-pair evolutionarily conserved cis-regulatory regions.
